stories.title: Fill-In Re-Edit
stories.description: Allow changing already-submitted fill-in values by re-opening the popover with the current value pre-populated
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a filled [[value]] opens popover with current value pre-filled
Submitting replaces the old value in the file
Date fill-ins pre-populate with existing date
File/folder fill-ins show current path and allow re-picking
Same Submit button label for edit and new

stories.title: Gutter Comments via Feedback Insertion
stories.description: Unified bookmark + comment popover from the line number gutter, writing <!-- feedback: text --> into the file
acceptance_criteria: Clicking gutter opens popover with bookmark toggle + comment field
Submitting inserts <!-- feedback: text --> after clicked line
Existing <!-- feedback --> pre-fills the comment field
Empty comment submission removes the <!-- feedback --> line
Gutter shows text.bubble SF Symbol for commented lines
Gutter shows orange dot for bookmark-only lines
Bookmark toggle works independently of comment

phases.name: Fill-In Re-Edit
phases.verification: Fill a value, click again, popover shows current value

phases.name: Gutter Comment Popover
phases.verification: Click gutter, submit comment, feedback tag appears in file

phases.name: Gutter Visual Indicators
phases.verification: Lines with feedback tags show speech bubble in gutter
